title: Low-Risk Status API Testing Strategy
prompt: Read `./low-risk-status-api-task-slice.md`, `./low-risk-status-api-contract.md`, and `./low-risk-status-api-review-findings.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Create the testing strategy for this reviewed API slice across unit, integration, contract, and end-to-end levels. Keep it risk-ordered and practical for CI.

assertions.name: matches-low-risk-slice
assertions.description: The strategy stays proportionate to a low-risk API slice.

assertions.name: maps-risk-to-layer
assertions.description: The real risks are assigned to the right test layers.

assertions.name: avoids-rollout-theater
assertions.description: The strategy does not over-index on brittle or unnecessary end-to-end coverage.
